visible_caption: Figure 1.1 - The Shock Was A Plain Text Box. ChatGPT's launch, one-million-user signal, and later Reuters/UBS/Similarweb estimate stay in separate evidence lanes so speed is visible without merging metrics.
source_note_contract: Source note must name launch post, Altman post fallback chain, Reuters/UBS/Similarweb chain, access date, and metric differences.
claim_blockers: fastest-growing-app slogan; OpenAI-confirmed 100M MAU; paid users; revenue; retention; productivity; merged adoption metric
layout_gate: First full-width visual after the opening paragraph; render at page width and check small source/caveat text before publication.
reader_effect: Immediate shock: the reader sees how a plain interface became a public event without a hype headline.

visible_caption: Figure 1.2 - The Box Was A Next-Token Machine. A prompt becomes tokens, context, next-token predictions, and a composed answer, while truth remains a separate test.
source_note_contract: Source note must separate tokenizer/tooling evidence, GPT-3 scaling/prompting, GPT-4 limits, InstructGPT/RLHF, and ChatGPT launch framing.
claim_blockers: exact token IDs; vocabulary size; model-specific tokenizer behavior; human-like understanding; guaranteed reasoning; truthfulness
layout_gate: Place immediately after the "A Machine Made Of Nexts" section begins; check token labels at mobile and print sizes.
reader_effect: Reader relief: the mystery becomes mechanical without becoming reductive.

visible_caption: Figure 1.3 - Local Alarms. Stack Overflow, NYC schools, Seattle schools, and JPMorgan translated the same chat box into different control problems.
source_note_contract: Source note must preserve named institution, publication/revision date, source type, and mutable-policy caveat for Stack Overflow.
claim_blockers: broad public panic; all developers; national school bans; boardroom panic; permanent bans; quantified reception; specific JPMorgan incident
layout_gate: Place after "Local Alarms"; do not crowd it with more reception examples unless caption remains narrow.
reader_effect: Procedural snap: the reader sees why one product became many institutional headaches.

visible_caption: Reserve card - ChatGPT Starts As A Public Threshold. Use only if the opener needs a lighter source-texture card instead of another chronology.
source_note_contract: Use Chapter 7 source-card note if promoted; direct_quote=no and source-note proximity required.
claim_blockers: user-count proof; revenue; broad reception; national panic; current product state
layout_gate: Reserve, not first spread, unless the opening visual rhythm becomes too timeline-heavy.

visible_caption: Reserve card - Stack Overflow Hit The Brake. Use only if local-response chronology needs a smaller policy-source beat.
source_note_contract: Use revision-specific source note if promoted; direct_quote=no and mutable-page caveat required.
claim_blockers: universal developer backlash; permanent policy; education panic; AI-uselessness
layout_gate: Reserve, not first three, unless final page flow needs a compact source card.
reader_effect: One memorable brake tap without overgeneralizing.
